summary: Soundboard capture of a psychedelic 1969 show bursting with LSD‑charged energy, highlighted by an inspired rendition of The Eleven.
review: Fans rave about the high‑octane vibe of this performance – the 'LSD energy' and even a Beefheart‑style detour make it memorable. The Eleven receives particular praise, while one reviewer felt some jams were merely interesting rather than great. No recording issues are noted, suggesting the soundboard source delivers clear, lively audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is 4.2/5; most comments are enthusiastic about the show and no technical problems are reported, indicating both a solid performance and good soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific complaints; reviewers imply the recording faithfully captures the concert's energy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a vibrant, improvisational set with psychedelic energy; one reviewer felt the jams were interesting but not consistently great.
